headline: How The Integer Holdings (ITGR) Narrative Is Shifting As Analysts Revisit Recovery Expectations
summary: Integer Holdings is back in focus as bullish analysts lift price targets into a US$92 to US$101 range, while the modeled fair value stays anchored at US$93.25. These higher targets are being framed around easing product headwinds by late 2026 and growing contributions from newer offerings, even as some Neutral ratings flag that part of the recovery story may already be in the price. Read on to see how to track this evolving narrative and what to watch as expectations shift. Stay updated as...
